because.text: Mixed dispositions, every checkable claim executed first. REFUTED: S7 observer paradox (waves never reach eval - FV-BOOK-I-UNREACHABLE is an executable vector, not a promise); S3/G2 no-termination-theory (eval is TOTAL, ATP is the measure, eval(Omega,n) canonical up to 3e6, memory bound proved - totality by fuel is the design); S4 float divergence (zero float/math usage in the Book I oracle, integer-only by construction, LUT arbiter-pinned); G1 local-determinism-as-flaw (ATP is an explicit eval argument - the specified contract, praised as a strength elsewhere in the same review). SETTLED, no new evidence: S8 universality (smallest verifiable machine, not a general runtime), S1/G5 static types (SKI-only settled; runtime type discipline everywhere via closed schemas). ACCEPTED: S5/G4 formal verification - the one deep gap named correctly; mitigation today is empirical (3 impls, generated vectors, differential, adversarial gates); Lean/Coq mechanization added to ROADMAP with the ADR-001 size-bound lemma as first target; S6 onboarding - QUICKSTART.md ships with this adjudication, its code block verified by execution; S4-speed - reference optimizes for auditability, Rust production impl = wanted contribution; S2 partially - interfere invariant-preservation lemma folded into the verification front. DECLINED: merged CLI/repos/language - the seam is the architecture, ski@v1 is the one designed coupling point.

subject.note: Qwen web holistic review (7.5/10): observer-paradox/termination/floats refuted by executable evidence; formal verification accepted as roadmap; QUICKSTART shipped
